metadata.disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner or physician before using any medicinal plant, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, or on medication.

dosha_effect.summary: Tridoshic — primarily Pitta and Vata pacifying

prakriti_advice.vata: Use gel externally freely. Internal juice: limit to 30ml/day, take warm.
prakriti_advice.pitta: Most beneficial for Pitta — cooling gel and juice both ideal.
prakriti_advice.kapha: Use sparingly internally — the heavy, cold nature can aggravate Kapha.

ayurvedic_properties.agni_impact: Manda — mildly suppresses digestive fire in excess
ayurvedic_properties.classical_reference: Charaka Samhita — classified as Bhedaniya (purgative) and Shothahara (anti-inflammatory)

medicinal_uses.method: Apply fresh gel directly to affected area
30ml aloe juice mixed with water on empty stomach
Apply gel as face mask, leave 20 minutes, rinse
10ml aloe gel in 100ml water, 30 min before meals

external: Fresh gel directly from leaf — most potent form
Mixed in face packs with turmeric or sandalwood
As scalp massage for dandruff and hair fall
internal: Aloe vera churna (powder): 3-6g with warm water
avoided_forms: Raw latex (yellow layer under skin) — strongly purgative and potentially harmful
Avoid internal use during pregnancy — uterine stimulant

contraindications: Pre-surgery — increases bleeding risk (stop 2 weeks before)
Children under 12 — internal use not recommended
Diabetics on medication — may cause dangerous hypoglycemia when combined

drug_interactions.interaction: Aloe latex causes potassium loss — combined with diuretics can cause severe hypokalemia
Additive blood sugar lowering — risk of hypoglycemia

seasonal_advice.best_season: Grishma (Summer) — cooling properties most therapeutic in heat
seasonal_advice.avoid_season: Shishira (Winter) — Sheeta virya aggravates cold-type Vata

aloevera.fun_fact: The ancient Egyptians called Aloe Vera the 'Plant of Immortality' — it was used in the burial rituals of pharaohs. Cleopatra reportedly used aloe gel as part of her daily skincare routine.

ekka.toxicity_warning: Latex is caustic — external use only, never near eyes. Internal use only under Ayurvedic expert supervision.

arali.toxicity_warning: TOXIC — Nerium oleander contains cardiac glycosides. Internal use can cause fatal arrhythmia. Never self-administer. Display red banner in Flutter.

caution_external_only.banner_text: External use only — do not ingest without expert guidance

toxic_expert_only.banner_text: TOXIC — For educational reference only. Never self-administer.
